author: Malcolm Earnshaw
content: Renegade installed a solar system for us, panels and battery storage for an off grid system. This went without a hitch. Ashley was punctual, completed the work to a very high standard and suggested improvements to our setup in order to get the best out of the system. I agree with other reviewers that Ashley goes the extra mile, rare these days. I have no hesitation in recommending Renegade, they will do a brilliant job.
